CP00-818's descriptor-level closeout claim is supported: registry binding/requirements match the baseline exactly (deliverable 20/20/80/14/9/7=150, independently counted), service.js keeps Claude read-only/non-final and Hermes no-write/no-receipt, validators + validate script + tests + the contract (validation.valid:true, CP00-818 promoted) all gate correctly, and no-write/no-real-data/no-leak boundaries hold throughout. The `production_ready:false` / `status:in_progress` state is the correct pre-closeout shape, confirmed against the closed CP00-817 precedent.

Only two P3 informational findings, both non-blocking and consistent with the prior pack: (1) closeout artifacts (command-evidence, claude-review-result, construction-inspection, adjudication) are not yet generated and npm/git commands could not be run under read-only tools — expected, since this review is the gate that precedes them; (2) a cosmetic dual-listing of new-session-handoff.md in changed-file-scope that does not affect authoritative scope. No P0/P1/P2.","stop_reason":"end_turn","session_id":"71d53881-8680-4122-bebc-27da33169dce","total_cost_usd":3.5825285,"usage":{"input_tokens":128,"cache_creation_input_tokens":144914,"cache_read_input_tokens":3502010,"output_tokens":36955,"server_tool_use":{"web_search_requests":0,"web_fetch_requests":0},"service_tier":"standard","cache_creation":{"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":144914,"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0},"inference_geo":"","iterations":[{"input_tokens":2,"output_tokens":456,"cache_read_input_tokens":138507,"cache_creation_input_tokens":6760,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":6760},"type":"message"}],"speed":"standard"},"modelUsage":{"claude-haiku-4-5-20251001":{"inputTokens":1191,"outputTokens":21,"cacheReadInputTokens":0,"cacheCreationInputTokens":0,"webSearchRequests":0,"costUSD":0.001296,"contextWindow":200000,"maxOutputTokens":32000},"claude-opus-4-8":{"inputTokens":128,"outputTokens":36955,"cacheReadInputTokens":3502010,"cacheCreationInputTokens":144914,"webSearchRequests":0,"costUSD":3.5812325,"contextWindow":200000,"maxOutputTokens":32000}},"permission_denials":[],"structured_output":{"overall_verdict":"PASS_WITH_FINDINGS","blocks_pack_closeout":false,"blocks_goal_closeout":false,"no_unresolved_p0":true,"no_unresolved_p1":true,"summary":"CP00-818 is an Enterprise SaaS hardening descriptor-level "review closeout API/UI bridge" pack (risk C, 150 units, RP26.P08.M09.S03-RP26.P09.M06.S06). Reviewed read-only via Read/Grep/Glob.

Production-ready claim is supportable and correctly scoped. The manifest declares production_ready:false, runtime_ready:false, status:in_progress, with production_ready_flag="enterprise_saas_review_closeout_api_ui_bridge_descriptor_verified" and implementation_summary asserting descriptor_only:true, runtime_execution:false, no_real_data:true, writes_product_state:false, local_validation_claims_enterprise_trust:false, human_final_approval_required_for_runtime_opening:true, production_ready_descriptor_verified:false. This is the expected pre-closeout state: the immediately prior closed pack CP00-817 shows this same shape and its review confirmed the flags flip to production_ready:true only at closeout, so false-at-review-time is correct, not a defect. The pack makes no runtime or enterprise-trust claim.

Implementation is consistent and well-bounded. registry.js ENTERPRISE_SAAS_CP818_PACK_BINDING (range RP26.P08.M09.S03-RP26.P09.M06.S06, upstream CP00-817, next CP00-819/RP26.P09.M06.S07) and ENTERPRISE_SAAS_CP818_REQUIREMENTS match the baseline exactly: deliverable_counts {claude_review:20, hermes_evidence:20, implementation:80, security_audit:14, test:9, ui:7}=150 (I independently counted the baseline included_units = same), phase_counts {P08:40, P09:110}, and micro_title distribution all match. Row-set constants sum to 150 (M09 20 via HERMES_EVIDENCE_CONTRACT_HANDOFF_ROWS.slice(2), M10 20, M00/M01 10 each, M02/M04 20 each, M03/M05 22 each, M06 6). service.js builds the CP818 descriptor (source EnterpriseSaasCp817...), Hermes packet (writes_product_state:false, emits_runtime_receipt:false, receipt_shape "descriptor_only_enterprise_saas_no_write"), Claude packet (read_only:true, promotes_claude_to_final_approval:false), and closeout handoff to CP00-819/RP26.P09.M06.S07; authority_boundary sets claude_is_final_approval:false, local_validation_claims_enterprise_trust:false, human_final_approval_required_for_runtime_opening:true. freezeResult injects NO_WRITE_ATTESTATION and createCaseSet emits descriptor-only frozen rows with no tenant/SSO/SCIM/secret payloads. The "API/UI bridge" naming carries no runtime: security_audit/ui deliverables are review-question descriptor rows (permission-bypass, audit-completeness, UI-leak questions), and ROW_EXTRAS keep executes_api_handler/executes_ui_runtime false. validators.js + scripts/validate-rp26-enterprise-saas-hardening-contract.mjs gate coverage, descriptor, contract (latest_pack must be CP00-818, latest_projection descriptor, validation.valid:true, mandatory artifacts, no-leak guards), capabilities, safety gates, and research alignment. model.test.js asserts coverage.errors==[], by_deliverable deepEqual, 150 rows, no real tenant data, no permission-decision/audit-event detail, no API/UI runtime, Hermes no-receipt, Claude read-only/non-final, handoff routing, and contract promotion reading the real contract JSON. The contract file promotes current/latest CP00-818 with cp818 projection and CP788-CP817 historical, validation.valid:true.

Authority and CP178+ review-hardening boundaries hold. Claude stays read_only_independent_reviewer (allowed_claude_tools=[Read,Grep,Glob]; not final approver); enterprise-trust closure is external to this receipt and the pack does not claim it; Hermes is not embedded in product runtime (descriptor-only no-write receipt handling). forbidden_review_evidence is defined (not_logged_in, malformed_json, usage_limit_error, permission_denial, write_tool_used, runtime_receipt_claim); readiness auth-preflight passed (exit 0, 1228-byte stdout, valid JSON {"ok":true}, no stderr); review-request mandates read_only + JSON-schema output; validation-report confirms summary_only_review_allowed:false (Risk C + security/audit + review-evidence), forbidden_tools_present:false, active_untracked_implementation_files_omitted:[]. changed-file-scope isolates the 7 active enterprise implementation refs + docs/closeout-packs/cp00-818 from unrelated dirty files.

Two P3 informational notes only; no P0/P1/P2. blocks_pack_on_p0_p1_p2 semantics mean these do not block closeout, and the human/enterprise-trust approval boundary being external does not block this CP closeout goal.","findings":[{"id":"CP818-R01","severity":"P3","title":"Closeout artifacts not yet present at review time; validation commands not independently executed (read-only)","file":"docs/closeout-packs/cp00-818/manifest.json","line":1627,"details":"manifest.required_pack_artifacts lists manifest.json, command-evidence.json, claude-review-result.json, adjudication.md, and construction-inspection.json, but docs/closeout-packs/cp00-818/ currently contains only manifest.json, and artifacts/closeout-pack-claude-review/cp00-818/ has no raw-output.json or review-receipt.json yet. pack_level_claude_review.status is 'pending_review' with empty valid_review_receipts/invalid_review_attempts. This is the expected pre-closeout state: this review is the gate that precedes generating command-evidence (validation command results), claude-review-result, construction-inspection, and adjudication, and flips production_ready, exactly as the prior closed pack CP00-817 demonstrates (it now has all five artifacts plus raw-output/review-receipt). As a read-only reviewer I could not run npm run closeout-pack:validate / npm test / npm run validate / git diff --check etc., so command/test PASS is verified by source consistency, internal validators, and prior-pack precedent rather than fresh execution.","recommendation":"Proceed. Ensure the closeout step records this review receipt, then generates command-evidence.json (commands actually exit 0 on the CP00-818 tree), construction-inspection.json, adjudication.md, and claude-review-result.json before flipping status/production_ready and recording exactly one valid pack-level review receipt.","post_review_disposition":"informational_expected_pre_closeout_state_not_blocking"},{"id":"CP818-R02","severity":"P3","title":"changed-file-scope dual-lists new-session-handoff.md as both implementation and unrelated","file":"artifacts/closeout-pack-claude-review/cp00-818/changed-file-scope.json","line":160,"details":"docs/closeout-pack-plan/new-session-handoff.md appears in both untracked_implementation_files (line 160) and unrelated_dirty_files_preserved (line 166). The authoritative pack scope is unaffected: active_pack_implementation_refs lists only the 7 enterprise files (contracts/enterprise-saas-hardening-contract.json, packages/enterprise/{README.md,src/registry.js,src/service.js,src/validators.js,test/model.test.js}, scripts/validate-rp26-enterprise-saas-hardening-contract.mjs) and active_pack_required_untracked_files is docs/closeout-packs/cp00-818; the manifest worktree_transition_policy also treats new-session-handoff.md as unrelated. validation-report confirms active_untracked_implementation_files_omitted=[] and forbidden_tools_present=false. Same cosmetic labeling carried over from CP00-817 (R02). Minor related nit: changed-file-scope.active_pack_required_untracked_files lists only docs/closeout-packs/cp00-818 while the manifest also lists artifacts/closeout-pack-claude-review/cp00-818 — both directories exist and are populated, so no scope impact.","recommendation":"Optionally tighten changed-file-scope classification so a file is not listed in both untracked_implementation_files and unrelated_dirty_files_preserved, and align the active_pack_required_untracked_files lists; no scope or boundary impact.","post_review_disposition":"cosmetic_labeling_inconsistency_not_blocking"}],"finding_counts":{"p0":0,"p1":0,"p2":0,"p3":2,"reported_p0":0,"reported_p1":0,"reported_p2":0,"reported_p3":2}},"terminal_reason":"completed","fast_mode_state":"off","uuid":"464d2a4d-9364-4e99-98ba-e1ecfd6b2efc"}
